# function: load_image_file

Loads an image file and encodes it as a base64 string. Also detects the MIME type of the input file.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
load_image_file(filepath string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `filepath` (String) The filename of the image
